title: SuperStream Contributions v3.0: is your SMSF ready?
description: SuperStream Contributions v3.0 introduces critical changes that support Payday Super.
keywords: SuperStream, Contributions, v3.0, changes, SMSF, errors

content_blocks.text: Our data and payment system, SuperStream Contributions v3.0 upgrades are central to supporting Payday Super. While the upgrades are technical in nature, they go beyond a system upgrade and will change how your self-managed super fund (SMSF) receives and processes contributions from unrelated employers.
Error handling is a key focus area of the upgrade. Systems will need to generate structured, consistent and actionable error messages, and validate them before sending.

items: errors should be picked up earlier
incorrect or incomplete information is more likely to be rejected straight away
employers and administrators can fix issues faster.

content_blocks.text: Gateway providers require correctly formed messages, increasing the reliance on accurate error messages from your SMSF to resolve issues quickly.
MVR is a new service that allows employers to check whether a fund, including your SMSF, can accept a contribution before the first payment is made.
From 1 July 2026 you need to respond to MVRs within 24 hours. Your administrator or software provider will usually manage this on your behalf.
Near real-time payments through the New Payments Platform (NPP)

The NPP allows near real-time payments between participating financial institutions 24 hours a day. Payments can carry more information than traditional transfers, making it easier to identify and reconcile transactions.
Your SMSF must be capable of receiving employer contributions through the NPP from 1 July 2026. You can engage with your bank, administrator and gateway to test NPP payments.
Updates to the Fund Validation Service also support faster processing and fewer errors. A new version will replace the current service from 1 July 2026.
Funds that don’t adopt the updated service will increase the risk of errors.
Implementing SuperStream v3.0 External Link is a core part of Payday Super, and preparation matters. Act now to help your SMSF make a smooth transition.
Visit SuperStream changes for more information.
Stay up to date by visiting our SMSF newsroom and subscribing External Link to our monthly newsletter.

content_text:
Our data and payment system, SuperStream Contributions v3.0 upgrades are central to supporting Payday Super. While the upgrades are technical in nature, they go beyond a system upgrade and will change how your self-managed super fund (SMSF) receives and processes contributions from unrelated employers.
## Key changes
### Clearer, validated error messaging
Error handling is a key focus area of the upgrade. Systems will need to generate structured, consistent and actionable error messages, and validate them before sending.
This means:
- errors should be picked up earlier
- incorrect or incomplete information is more likely to be rejected straight away
- employers and administrators can fix issues faster.
Gateway providers require correctly formed messages, increasing the reliance on accurate error messages from your SMSF to resolve issues quickly.
### Member verification request (MVR)
MVR is a new service that allows employers to check whether a fund, including your SMSF, can accept a contribution before the first payment is made.
From 1 July 2026 you need to respond to MVRs within 24 hours. Your administrator or software provider will usually manage this on your behalf.
### Near real-time payments through the New Payments Platform (NPP)
The NPP allows near real-time payments between participating financial institutions 24 hours a day. Payments can carry more information than traditional transfers, making it easier to identify and reconcile transactions.
Your SMSF must be capable of receiving employer contributions through the NPP from 1 July 2026. You can engage with your bank, administrator and gateway to test NPP payments.
### Fund validation service changes
Updates to the Fund Validation Service also support faster processing and fewer errors. A new version will replace the current service from 1 July 2026.
Funds that don’t adopt the updated service will increase the risk of errors.
### Act now
Implementing SuperStream v3.0 External Link is a core part of Payday Super, and preparation matters. Act now to help your SMSF make a smooth transition.
Visit SuperStream changes for more information.
Stay up to date by visiting our SMSF newsroom and subscribing External Link to our monthly newsletter.
